# Extracao: transcription_mp4_15__If_I_Don_t_Hear_Back__I_will_Ship_the_Product

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_15__If_I_Don_t_Hear_Back__I_will_Ship_the_Product.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Hey, I once had a client probably like you have. He wouldn't get back with me and I'd called him 15 times. He was in Memphis. I've told this story before. Maybe you've heard it. He wouldn't get back with me and what I did to finally get him to call me back was I left a message saying, if I don't hear back from you, I'm gonna go ahead and shift the product out. Literally four seconds later or less, I got a phone call. Okay, what I did in this call was this and you have to be in the right situation to do this. You will have to be far enough into the sales process with product, the pick, the selection to know what to send them but you're gonna do this. If I don't hear back from you, I'm just gonna go ahead and ship the product out. All right, you'll get a call back. Trust me. And this is a very aggressive, very, very aggressive call. You better be ready for it when it comes back to you.
